name: 2.5L 2pk Sort it Storage Containers with 6 Shallow Cups - Brightroom™
description:
Organize small items in your home for quick accessibility with these 2-Pack Sort-It Storage Containers with Shallow Cups from Brightroom™. Made from BPA-free material, each of these transparent storage containers has six multiple shallow cups in varying shapes to store a variety of items. These storage containers have lids with latch closures to keep the items in place and prevent damage from dirt and dust.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
